caption: The video captures a presentation in a classroom or conference setting. A woman, dressed in a black blazer over a white shirt, stands confidently in front of a projector screen, holding a tablet and gesturing as she speaks. The first slide behind her displays an image of a family gathered around a vintage television, with the text "domesticating technology" above it, suggesting a discussion on how technology integrates into daily life. As the video progresses, the slide changes to show a person meditating, accompanied by the text "data as a practice," indicating a shift in the topic towards mindfulness and data practices. An audience member wearing a green beanie is visible in the foreground, attentively listening to the presenter. The setting includes a few chairs and a table with some items, creating a casual yet professional atmosphere for the presentation.
